personalInfo.name: Aneeq Hussain
personalInfo.title: AI Engineer & Machine Learning Specialist
personalInfo.tagline: Building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems

about.summary: AI Engineer and ML Specialist with hands-on experience building scalable AI systems for real-world applications. Currently an AI Intern at the National Intelligence Fusion and Threat Assessment Center (NIFTAC) via itsolera, focused on intelligent security solutions. Passionate about Computer Vision, Deep Learning, and deploying production-ready ML models.
highlights: AI Intern at NIFTAC — building intelligent security & threat assessment solutions
Developed Chlorophyll Guardian, an AI-powered plant disease detection system (Final Year Project)
Expert in Computer Vision, Deep Learning, and model deployment (Docker, FastAPI, GPU environments)
Built 7+ open-source projects including CVSense, Loan Insight AI, and Attrition Predictor
Strong background in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and end-to-end ML pipelines

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence
highlights: Final Year Project: Chlorophyll Guardian — AI-powered plant disease detection using Computer Vision
Relevant Coursework: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, Data Science, Algorithms
Built multiple academic projects: PandemicInsights, EarthTempAnalysis, Sentiment Analysis

experience.title: AI Intern
experience.description: Building scalable AI systems for national intelligence and security applications at the National Intelligence Fusion and Threat Assessment Center.
achievements: Developing Computer Vision pipelines for real-world threat assessment applications
Working with GPU environments and model deployment infrastructure
Building and optimizing deep learning models for security-focused use cases
Collaborating on scalable AI system architecture for intelligence applications
Implementing production-ready APIs and Docker-based deployment workflows

experience.title: AI Research & Development — Final Year Project
experience.description: Developed Chlorophyll Guardian, an AI-powered plant disease detection and health monitoring system for precision agriculture.
achievements: Built deep learning CNN models for multi-class plant disease classification with high accuracy
Processed and augmented agricultural image datasets for robust model training
Implemented computer vision techniques for real-time chlorophyll level analysis
Published the project on Kaggle for open community access
Designed a user-friendly interface for real-time disease detection and treatment recommendations

experience.title: ML & Data Science Projects
experience.description: Designed and developed multiple end-to-end ML applications across diverse domains — HR analytics, finance, NLP, and climate science.
achievements: Built CVSense: an intelligent resume screening ML pipeline with Google Drive integration
Developed Loan Insight AI: full-stack loan prediction with FastAPI backend + premium glassmorphism UI
Created Employee Attrition Predictor: Random Forest + Gradient Boosting HR analytics dashboard
Implemented Scholarship Email Automation: AI-assisted email drafting and batch dispatch platform
Performed global pandemic and climate temperature analysis with interactive visualizations

publications.title: Chlorophyll Guardian: AI-Powered Plant Health Monitoring
publications.description: Comprehensive notebook demonstrating plant disease detection using deep learning and computer vision
